co_evolution: corpus now contains ConcordGate + Confluence (fed back); Meander transplants Confluence's seeded-deterministic-generation gene into the games domain
distinct_character: third character produced by the loop: verify(ConcordGate) -> design(Confluence) -> play(Meander)

Verify.invariants: perfect maze (passages==cells-1), always solvable, symmetric passages, deterministic

deliverable: Meander/ — deterministic maze generator+solver; single stdlib module, README(hero), LICENSE(MIT), examples/3 (engine-rendered), tests/14, cli_triplet sample/generate/solve
